@graph.description: This dataset represents a heterogeneous aggregation of metadata records.

@graph.name: Curated collection of heterogeneous research metadata records
@graph.description: A curated collection of heterogeneous research metadata records, harvested via OAI-PMH and normalised to support FAIR-compliant analysis within the EDO toolchain, focusing on metadata orchestration, publication integrity, and the epistemological implications of semantic interoperability.
